name: Tray Blocker
description: Nine belt slots are blocked by a stone tray. Tap blocker boxes to send gray marbles that fill and shatter the tray, freeing those slots.
howToPlay: Tap blocker boxes (striped with gray marbles) to send 3 blocker marbles each toward the tray. Once all 9 tray slots are filled, the tray shatters and those belt slots become usable. Decide when to clear the tray — early to free space, or later if you can manage the cramped belt.
author: Claude

showcaseLevel.name: Tray Demo
showcaseLevel.desc: Clear the tray to free the belt
